Considering everything we've discussed, **I would not build JARVIS as "a chatbot with features."** I would build it as an **AI Operating System** where every version is a stable milestone.

The roadmap below is designed so that by **V25**, your project can compete with advanced open-source AI assistants while remaining **100% local-first** and allowing optional cloud APIs later.
